bad_commit_title: Faster isiterable when x isn't iterable.
method: blind-replay: AVERA receives only baseline.xml (good code) and current.xml (bad code re-applied); it is given no hint where the bug is.
honest_note: Historically this regression SLIPPED past toolz's own CI because no test expressed it yet (the catching test was added in the revert PR). AVERA catches it once a test expresses the bug; it does not catch regressions no test exercises (that is the mutation-lens's job, not the gate's).
